---
title: "Stakeholder Engagement and Regional Priorities"
format: html
---

::: top-banner
:::

::: text-center
*Monday, June 9, 2026*
:::

::: text-center
*1:30 pm*
:::

::: text-center
*Facilitator: Dylan Glave*
:::

This working group is designed for participants focused on policy relevance, regional coordination, and the practical use of workshop outputs.

## Participants

| Name | Role | Institution |
|------|------|-------------|
| Dylan Glave | Facilitator | MCSS |
| Christian/Marco | Participant | CI Mesoamerica |
| Mariana Vera | Participant | CI Ecuador |
| Fausto Arias | Participant | CI Costa Rica |
| Damian Pardo | Participant | CI Colombia |
| Tito Navia | Participant | GIZ |
| Leonardo Marriaga | Participant | CPPS |

## Focus areas

- Regional priorities
- Stakeholder engagement
- Policy and decision-support relevance
- Coordination across institutions
- Project next steps and regional usefulness
